rationale: The citing paper references Kivetz and Simonson (2002) only once in the literature review to support a general claim that people may feel they have earned indulgence after effort. The paper does not build its hypotheses, manipulations, measures, or analyses around the cited paper's effort-based reward mechanism. Its tested mechanisms are price fairness and healthiness perceptions in surcharge/label interventions, so this citation functions as background context rather than a core building block.
